# Flexible Packaging Solutions Since 1981 [Exceptional Quality, Service & Speed to Market](https://www.polynova.com/#packaging) [![bag1](https://www.polynova.com/images/home_four_top/home-product-1.jpg)](https://www.polynova.com/flexible-packaging/preformed-pouches.html) ### [Preformed Pouches](https://www.polynova.com/flexible-packaging/preformed-pouches.html) [From farm to table, freezer to oven, we supply a wide range of food packaging solutions.](https://www.polynova.com/flexible-packaging/preformed-pouches.html) [Learn more](https://www.polynova.com/flexible-packaging/preformed-pouches.html) [![bag2](https://www.polynova.com/images/home_four_top/home-product-2.jpg)](https://www.polynova.com/flexible-packaging/films.html) ### [Films](https://www.polynova.com/flexible-packaging/films.html) [Multi-layer high-barrier film. Custom-made for automated food packaging and for a wide range of other applications.](https://www.polynova.com/flexible-packaging/films.html) [Learn more](https://www.polynova.com/flexible-packaging/films.html) [![bag3](https://www.polynova.com/images/home_four_top/home-product-3.jpg)](https://www.polynova.com/flexible-packaging/sustainable-packaging.html) ### [Sustainable Packaging](https://www.polynova.com/flexible-packaging/sustainable-packaging.html) [100% recyclable barrier pouch bags. The foremost environmentally friendly ...](https://www.polynova.com/flexible-packaging/sustainable-packaging.html) [Learn more](https://www.polynova.com/flexible-packaging/sustainable-packaging.html) [![bag4](https://www.polynova.com/images/home_four_top/home-product-4.jpg)](https://www.polynova.com/flexible-packaging/poly-bags.html) ### [Poly Bags](https://www.polynova.com/flexible-packaging/poly-bags.html) [Plastic handle bags with beautiful custom print are one of Polynova’s best known products. Eco-friendly, ...](https://www.polynova.com/flexible-packaging/poly-bags.html) [Learn more](https://www.polynova.com/flexible-packaging/poly-bags.html) ### Poly Bag Supplier – Custom Flexible   Packaging Solution Provider #### **Full-Service Solutions Throughout North America** **Polynova is a comprehensive flexible packaging solution provider producing a wide range of plastic bag and films.** As a leading poly bag supplier serving the Canadian and US markets since 1981, we deliver customized, high quality print solutions for plastic bags, pouches and other packaging options. When you need a poly bag or pouch that is practical, affordable and does justice to your product and brand image, Polynova is your best choice. **Quick turnaround** and **unbeatable quality** coupled with **excellent customer service** is why customers depend on us as their custom flexible packaging solution provider. Headquartered in Richmond, BC, Canada, our strategic South-Western location helps us reach out and cater to the needs of our customers across Canada and the USA. All our product lines are manufactured upon **custom specification**. Years of manufacturing have helped us master the poly bag technology to ensure that our customers have the required **flexibility** to combine the properties of different product groups. For example, a full-colour high quality print handle bag can be ordered in both, bio-degradable or reusable form. Or, a temper proof bag can be made of any type of coex, or laminated film. We can supply a very wide range of PE and PP materials from LDPE, HDPE, CPE, PPE, PP, OPP, or PVC, to non-woven cloth or biodegradable material. The number of choices and variations are literally infinite; **you only have to tell us what you need and we’ll deliver**! [Get in touch](https://www.polynova.com/contact-us.html) More Close [Award-Winning
Printing Capabilities](https://www.polynova.com/printing.html "Award-Winning
Printing Capabilities") ![Award-Winning Printing Capabilities](https://www.polynova.com/images/icons/icon.award.png) Award-Winning Printing Capabilities ### [Award-Winning \ \ Printing Capabilities](https://www.polynova.com/printing.html) State-of-the-art printing technology supported by our expert in-house graphics team ensures stunning visuals for your packaging. **›** [Small Runs
 and Rush Orders](https://www.polynova.com/about-us.html#why "Small Runs
 and Rush Orders") ![Small Runs  and Rush Orders](https://www.polynova.com/images/icons/icon-delivery.png) Small Runs and Rush Orders ### [Small Runs \ \  and Rush Orders](https://www.polynova.com/about-us.html\#why) Delivery time for a new custom-designed bag is as short as 4 weeks! Consignment-based, just-in time logistical solutions are provided as required. **›** [100% Recyclable
Barrier Pouch & Film](https://www.polynova.com/sustainability.html "100% Recyclable
Barrier Pouch & Film") ![100% Recyclable Barrier Pouch & Film](https://www.polynova.com/images/icons/icon-recyclabe.png) 100% Recyclable Barrier Pouch & Film ### [100% Recyclable \ \ Barrier Pouch & Film](https://www.polynova.com/sustainability.html) Our personalized packaging solutions are designed to reduce the carbon footprint of your product while exceeding the strictest food safety standards. **›** [Custom
Packaging Solutions](https://www.polynova.com/flexible-packaging.html "Custom
Packaging Solutions") ![Custom Packaging Solutions](https://www.polynova.com/images/icons/icon-custom.png) Custom Packaging Solutions ### [Custom \ \ Packaging Solutions](https://www.polynova.com/flexible-packaging.html) Showcase your product in captivating, tailor-made packaging that perfectly meets your requirements. **›** ### Print Technology ### Digital Press Tailored for a range of applications. Our technology will ensure exceptional quality, rapid turnaround, competitive pricing, and expedited delivery. ![Digital Press](https://www.polynova.com/images/home_print_technology/Digital-Press.png) ### Flexographic Unlock the potential for extraordinary packaging enhancements, including in-line special finishes like foil and matte effects. Our cutting-edge digital calibration ensures optimum precision, guaranteeing exceptional print results every time. ![Flexographic](https://www.polynova.com/images/home_print_technology/Flexographic.png) ### Rotogravure Unparalleled quality and cost-effectiveness for large-scale production. With our ability to print both solids and process tones, you will experience exceptional versatility and efficiency in creating visually stunning packaging for your products. ![Rotogravure](https://www.polynova.com/images/home_print_technology/Rotogravure.png) [Partner1](https://www.polynova.com/news/cpa-sustainability-award-winner.html "Partner1") ![Partner1](https://www.polynova.com/images/credentials2/logo1.png)![Partner1](https://www.polynova.com/media/widgetkit/logo1-hover-fa93404b6dc13052f682e4a5350addea.png) [Partner2](https://www.polynova.com/about-us.html "Partner2") ![Partner2](https://www.polynova.com/images/credentials2/logo2.png)![Partner2](https://www.polynova.com/media/widgetkit/logo2-hover-05586cda524cbd76ea4a44119e3a2568.png) [Partner3](https://www.polynova.com/images/stories/pdf/cert-2022.pdf "Partner3") ![Partner3](https://www.polynova.com/images/credentials2/logo3.png)![Partner3](https://www.polynova.com/media/widgetkit/logo3-hover-450ddb463337daa685ab482da5978745.png) [Partner4](https://www.polynova.com/about-us.html "Partner4") ![Partner4](https://www.polynova.com/images/credentials2/logo4.png)![Partner4](https://www.polynova.com/media/widgetkit/logo4-hover-cc6416286b4b12cdaff6bbe72e3f2ef6.png) [Partner5](https://www.polynova.com/images/stories/pdf/cert-2022.pdf "Partner5") ![Partner5](https://www.polynova.com/images/credentials2/logo5.png)![Partner5](https://www.polynova.com/media/widgetkit/logo5-hover-26e2411d17b9c9e1c709fd26d0719409.png) ### Your Flexible Packaging Supplier of Choice Our biggest advantage to customers is that we are vertically integrated, producing the plastic film, designing the graphics, printing and manufacturing the bag or pouch all in-house. That’s how we keep both quality and delivery timelines completely in our control. × × ↑
